name: Fabled Dianaira
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>轟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ディアネイラ
desc: You can Tribute Summon this card in face-up Attack Position by Tributing 1 "Fabled" monster. Once per turn, the first opponent's Normal Spell Card effect to resolve becomes "Your opponent discards 1 card".
mnst_eff: You can Tribute Summon this card in face-up Attack Position by Tributing 1 "Fabled" monster. Once per turn, the first opponent's Normal Spell Card effect to resolve becomes "Your opponent discards 1 card".
